rules: Use Blue (#2563EB) only for primary actions and key highlights.
Never use pure black (#000000); use Slate-900 (#0F172A).
Backgrounds should be White or very light Slate (#F8FAFC).
Borders should be subtle (#E2E8F0) unless active/focused.

landing_page.description: Asymmetrical grid with varied span sizes. Hero section dominating 2/3 width.

dashboard.description: Dense, data-focused. Sidebar navigation. 4-column grid for widgets.

cards.style: Flat with 1px border (#E2E8F0), no shadow by default.

inputs.style: bg-slate-50 border-slate-200 focus:border-blue-500 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-100 rounded-lg h-12

visual_enhancers.gradients: Subtle top-down fades (e.g., bg-gradient-to-b from-slate-50 to-white). NO heavy diagonals.
visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Use sparingly on sticky headers: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80 border-b border-slate-200/50.
visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft, diffuse shadows (shadow-xl) for floating elements (modals, dropdowns).
visual_enhancers.borders: 1px solid #E2E8F0. Use 'The Tracing Beam' effect for pricing/active states.

icons.style: Stroke width 1.5px or 2px. Blue-600 for active, Slate-400 for inactive.

hero.alt: Professional African trader using mobile app

motion.hover_effects: Scale 1.02 on cards. Color shift on buttons.
motion.page_load: Fade in + Slide up (y: 20 -> y: 0, opacity: 0 -> 1).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text is Slate-900 on White, or White on Blue-600.

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the 'Performance Pro' archetype: Clean, Fast, White & Blue.
Do NOT use standard 'Bootstrap' layouts. Use the 'Bento' grid strategy.
For the Landing Page: Use large typography (text-5xl+) and asymmetry.
For the Dashboard: Focus on data density and clarity. No unnecessary whitespace in data tables.
Implement the 'Tracing Beam' effect on the 'Buy/Sell' active tabs.
Ensure all interactive elements have 'data-testid' for testing.
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts, no gradient text unless specified.
Micro-animations are mandatory for every interaction.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical (p-8 instead of p-4) for the landing page.
Never use pure black; use Slate-900.
